---
title: "My Assignments"
---

On this page, I showcase the assignment I conducted for the \[term and year, e.g. Spring 2024-2025\] EMU660 Decision Making with Analytics course.

Please use left menu to navigate through my assignments.

# Murders Stats

In this part, we will find states with higher murder rates.

```{r}
library(dslabs)
data(murders)
print(murders)
```

Lets order states based on their murder rates.

```{r}
murder_rate <- murders$total / murders$population
print(murders$state[order(murder_rate)])
```

## The State with minimum murder rate

```{r, echo=FALSE}
state_with_min = murders$state[which.min(murder_rate)]
```

Burcu should move to `{r} state_with_min`
